title: J Martin
compiled_truth: J Martin is an external contact at [Baylor](companies/baylor). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-30), J Martin sent 58 and received 56 emails, totalling 114 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vkamins](people/vkamins) (31), [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (20), [Bill Petty](people/bill-petty-baylor) (9), [Titman](people/titman-mail) (8), [Wangfa](people/wangfa-rice) (8).
